title: SSUHS B.Sc Nursing Exam Date 2026 OUT

detail.title: SSUHS B.Sc Nursing Exam Date 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: SSUHS B.Sc Nursing CEE 2026 exam will be held on 07 June 2026. Check exam timing, admit card date, exam pattern, subject-wise marks and official notification at ssuhs.in

sections.heading: SSUHS B.Sc Nursing Exam Date 2026 OUT

content.text: Srimanta Sankaradeva University of Health Sciences (SSUHS) has officially announced the SSUHS B.Sc Nursing Exam Date 2026 for admission into B.Sc Nursing courses in Assam. The Common Entrance Examination (CEE) will be conducted on 07 June 2026 (Sunday). Candidates can check the complete schedule on the official website - ssuhs.in.

The entrance test will be held in offline mode from 10:00 AM to 12:00 Noon. Students who have applied can download the official notification and important details using their login credentials. Admit cards will be available from 25 May 2026.
Students are advised to verify all details carefully from the official source and contact the university in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: SSUHS B.Sc Nursing Exam Date 2026 Overview

content.text: SSUHS B.Sc Nursing Exam Date 2026 offers a key opportunity for students seeking admission to B.Sc Nursing programs in government and private nursing institutes across Assam. The exam date and other important schedules have been released officially.

rows: Srimanta Sankaradeva University of Health Sciences

sections.heading: SSUHS B.Sc Nursing 2026 Subject Wise Exam Date & Schedule

content.text: The SSUHS B.Sc Nursing entrance exam 2026 will be conducted on a single day with one paper covering all subjects. The question paper will include English, Physics, Chemistry and Biology as per Class 12 level syllabus.

sections.heading: How to Download SSUHS B.Sc Nursing Exam Date 2026 Notification

content.text: Students can download the official SSUHS B.Sc Nursing Exam Date 2026 notification and important guidelines from the university website. The process is quick and straightforward.

items: Visit the official website of SSUHS at ssuhs.in.
Navigate to the latest notices or entrance examination section on the homepage.
Click on the link for SSUHS CEE 2026 or B.Sc Nursing Information Bulletin.
The PDF file will open. Carefully read all the important dates and instructions.
Click the download button to save the notification on your device.
Take a printout and keep it safe for future reference during exam preparation.

content.text: Always check the official timetable carefully and keep a printed copy handy for your exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in SSUHS B.Sc Nursing Exam Date 2026 Notification

content.text: The official SSUHS B.Sc Nursing 2026 notification provides complete information regarding the entrance examination and admission process.
